summary: M4 large-run rehearsal profile delivered. policy-large-run-rehearsal.json declares budgets (maxRounds/maxSourcesPerRound/maxPagesPerSource/maxRaw/Seed/Card/VectorRecord/ArtifactBytes/ResumeScanSeconds/SourceTimeoutPerRound), backpressure thresholds (minNewEvidence/minRoi/consecutiveLowYieldRoundsStop), and four-mode matrix (no-write / jsonl-only / dual-write / vector-smoke). run_large_run_rehearsal.py drives the rehearsal entirely from policy, emits per-round backpressure telemetry ledger with all required fields, stops on artifact-budget-exhausted / consecutive-low-yield / timeout-saturation. 5 smoke tests (45+ assertions) cover all four modes and budget-triggered stop.

artifacts.description: Rehearsal policy: 4 modes (no-write / jsonl-only / dual-write / vector-smoke), budgets, backpressure thresholds, required telemetry fields (17 keys), guards (no hardcoded general/source/cleanup strings).

Reads policy, picks mode from policy.modes (rejects unknown), runs budgeted simulation, emits rehearsal-report.json + backpressure-telemetry-ledger.json. Stop reasons: artifact-budget-exhausted, consecutive-low-yield, timeout-saturation, max-rounds-reached.

5 tests with 45+ assertions: all four modes run, telemetry ledger fields complete, artifact budget triggers stop under tight policy, low-yield triggers consecutive-low-yield stop, output files written to root.
Sample sources config: 4 sources (3kweb, baike-romance, novel-tang, relationship-db-foo) with per-round byte / seed / card / new-evidence / timeout / resume-scan expectations.
Sample rehearsal report in dual-write mode; rounds, stopReason, totals, modeDetails.
Sample backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1 with rows covering all 17 telemetry fields.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: large-run rehearsal profile limits round/source/page/raw bytes/seed/card/vector record counts
acceptanceMapping.evidence: policy.budgets.{maxRounds, maxSourcesPerRound, maxPagesPerSource, maxRawBytesPerSource, maxRawBytesPerRound, maxSeedsPerRound, maxCardsPerRound, maxVectorRecordsPerRound, maxArtifactBytesPerRun, maxResumeScanSeconds, maxSourceTimeoutPerRound}.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: backpressure driven by policy/telemetry, no hardcoded general/source/cleanup
acceptanceMapping.evidence: policy.backpressure thresholds + policy.guards (no-hardcoded-general-id-in-runner, no-hardcoded-source-id-in-runner, no-hardcoded-cleanup-string-in-runner). Runner reads everything from policy + sources-config.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: each round emits ROI, timeout, new-evidence, resume seconds, PG row count, vector count, artifact bytes
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Telemetry row fields include roiScore, timeoutCount, newEvidenceCount, resumeScanSeconds, postgresRowCount, vectorRecordCount, artifactBytes, plus 10 more. Smoke test verifies required field set.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: rehearsal runs in no-write / jsonl-only / dual-write / vector-smoke modes
acceptanceMapping.evidence: policy.modes lists all four; runner rejects modes not in policy.modes; smoke test runs all four.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0402: runbook documents how to interpret backpressure-telemetry ledger and which mode to escalate to
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0501: cutover decision requires successful dual-write + vector-smoke rehearsal across consecutive runs
